prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (7-bolt, 85.4mm bore, 88mm stroke) with forged internals including JUN 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings for 1.2mm overbore capacity. Paired with a Tomei 272°/11.5mm lift camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Tomei Type-R valve springs/retainers to handle 9,000 RPM safely.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT2860RS-5 (0.64 A/R turbine housing, 60 trim compressor wheel) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a Bellmouth Designs divorced wastegate dump tube and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 28 psi on 100-octane fuel. Intercooler upgraded to a GReddy Type-25 front-mount with 2.5-inch aluminum piping and Mishimoto silicone couplers.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the rear differential, Cusco 1.5-way front LSD, and a PPG straight-cut 5-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 1.950, 3rd: 1.407, 4th: 1.031, 5th: 0.771) with a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch and billet flywheel. Driveshaft replaced with a custom 3.5-inch carbon fiber unit from Driveshaft Shop.
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit (Evo IV-specific) with custom carbon fiber front fenders (1.5-inch wider than OEM) and a Rocket Bunny rear overfender set (2-inch wider). Front bumper replaced with a C-West JUN Version 3 lip with integrated canards, while the rear uses a custom 3D-printed diffuser from APR Performance (Evo IV-specific).

Aero: Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height) with carbon fiber endplates and a custom Gurney flap. Underbody features a full-length carbon fiber flat floor from Seibon, including a front splitter extension with adjustable dive planes (30mm overhang). Hood replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit featuring a 3-inch tall vented scoop for intercooler ducting.

Wheels/Suspension: Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 (front) and 18x10.5 +25 (rear) with 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Suspension uses Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with Eibach ERS 1400N/m front springs and 1200N/m rear springs. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (full chassis refresh) and Cusco front strut bar (22mm diameter).
